title: Date Extractor
scenario: Write a simple Python function that takes a string input representing a date in the format 'Month Day, Year', and outputs the extracted date in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
constraints: Must use Python's built-in datetime module

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid Python code
The generated code should adhere to the given constraints (lines of code, datetime module)
The generated code should correctly process the input and output the extracted date in the correct format
